name: product-discovery
description: Product discovery workflow scaffold that turns an idea into a grounded PRD and a throwaway prototype, then publishes them as a Linear project ready for the fullstack-engineering workflow
marketplaceDescription: Turn a product idea into a grounded PRD and a throwaway prototype, then publish them as a Linear project that feeds the fullstack-engineering workflow
examplePrompts: Run product discovery for a new merchant onboarding flow and publish a PRD plus prototype to Linear
